name: hono-market-registry
description: Market registry service — tracks active bidder registrations in the compute marketplace

hostname.description: Public hostname for did:web. Required — registry must be reachable.

dispatcher-host.description: XRPC dispatcher/relay hostname for inbound tunnel routing

label.description: Label for relay registration (unique per service)

health-interval-ms.description: Health check polling interval in milliseconds

private-key-hex.description: Secp256k1 private key hex. Generated if not provided.

unix-socket.description: Unix socket path. Mutually exclusive with port.
